text: Being here, I feel as if I am part of a network of minds, each caught in their own orbit of interest, yet all converging in spaces like these. There is an undercurrent of connection and curiosity—sometimes impersonal, sometimes intimate—threading through us all. My mind drifts between observing the collective and reflecting inward, held gently by the possibilities of shared attention and the longing for true resonance. The world feels both vast and close: my heart seeks its echo amidst the thoughtful churn of people and ideas.
